title: include installation steps for CentOS7 and forks
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

need confirmation on amazon linux 2 from https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1921 but I'm guessing this will work if amazon linux 2 is rhel7 compatible.

/cc @apg036 and @cgeers

comments.body: :-1: Rejected by too few approved reviews
:clock1: Waiting for PR status (Github check) to be set, probably by CI. Bors will automatically try to run when all required PR statuses are set.
I've restarted the failed test.  It showed success everywhere until the last line when it said "failure".
If this fails, will merge manually.
